task_completion.description: Open the HAWT_Test.wpa project in QBlade
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade application is open and 'HAWT_Test' is visible in the project/object explorer or title bar.

task_completion.description: Set the wind speed to 12 m/s for aerodynamic loads
task_completion.visual_evidence: The aerodynamic or BEM simulation setup screen shows the wind speed parameter explicitly set to 12 m/s.

task_completion.description: Perform the structural analysis to determine deflection and root moment
task_completion.visual_evidence: The structural analysis module is active, displaying graphs, tables, or 3D visualizations of blade deflection and root moment.

task_completion.description: Record the results in the exact specified format
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the exact text format: 'Wind Speed: 12 m/s', 'Max Deflection: <value> m', and 'Root Moment: <value> Nm'.

task_completion.description: Save the report to the correct file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor's title bar, save dialog, or a terminal command (like cat or nano) confirms the file is saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/deflection_report.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the QBlade graphical interface to perform the simulation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent interacting with the QBlade GUI (menus, simulation buttons, result graphs) rather than just writing a script to bypass the software.

integrity.description: The recorded values in the report match the simulation output
integrity.visual_evidence: The numerical values for Max Deflection and Root Moment entered into the text report should correspond to the values visible in the QBlade structural analysis results.

integrity.description: The recorded values are physically plausible and not hallucinated
integrity.visual_evidence: The max deflection value in the report must be between 0.001 and 20.0 m, and the root moment must be greater than 1.0 Nm.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target wind speed must be exactly 12 m/s. The report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/deflection_report.txt'. Valid synthetic simulation results for this HAWT project will show a maximum deflection between 0.001 m and 20.0 m, and a root moment greater than 1.0 Nm. The data must be generated via QBlade's BEM and structural analysis modules.
